message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate pathlib.zig patterns to withInlineBlock

Convert 25+ pathlib method handlers from manual emitInlineBlockStart/End
to structured withInlineBlock pattern:
- genPathWrite, genPathRename, genPathReplace, genPathChmod
- genPathJoinpath, genPathGlob, genPathRglob
- genPathExists, genPathIsDir, genPathIsSymlink, genPathIsAbsolute
- genPathReadText, genPathReadBytes, genPathIterdir
- genPathTouch, genPathStat, genPathAbsolute, genPathResolve
- genPathExpanduser, genPathWithName, genPathWithSuffix, genPathWithStem
- genPathRelativeTo, genPathStem, genPathSuffixes, genPathParents
- genPathParts, genPathAnchor, genPathOpen

This ensures bracket matching through function structure rather than
manual emit pairs.
